__fixture__.name: grace_degraded_managed_outage
__fixture__.scenario: Grace-degraded-managed boundary during a managed-service outage under managed_workspace identity mode. The managed convenience layer is unreachable; the boundary narrows to a bounded grace posture where self-hosted IdP paths remain usable via the system browser and local work continues without interruption. The downgrade path names managed_service_unreachable and preserves local work.

boundary_label: Managed services temporarily unreachable – grace posture
plain_language_summary: The managed service is temporarily unreachable. Local work continues; the self-hosted IdP path remains usable via the system browser.

visible_downgrade_path.downgrade_note: If the managed outage continues past the grace window, Aureline narrows to the self-hosted posture. Local work continues throughout; managed-only lanes remain blocked until the managed service recovers.

preserved_local_work.note: Local work is intact. Managed-only lanes narrow until the managed service recovers; self-hosted IdP sign-in via the system browser continues.
retained_capabilities: Open, edit, save, and undo local workspaces.
Search over the local workspace and navigate symbols.
Run local Git commands and commit locally.
Run local tasks and debuggers in trusted workspaces.
Use BYOK AI providers and local model execution.
Use the self-hosted IdP path through the system browser.
blocked_capabilities: Fetch managed settings sync until the managed service recovers.
Open managed marketplace or managed AI quota views.

reserved_rows.note: Passkey / WebAuthn step-up remains available via the system browser through the self-hosted IdP path during the grace window.
Managed session expired during the outage; reauth is required via the self-hosted IdP path now or through the managed surface once it recovers.
Reserved for the managed seat-removal row; local-only work MUST remain representable.
Declares that managed deprovision during or after the outage MUST preserve local workspace, local Git, local tasks, and BYOK AI capability.
